invariants: All playable characters are original fictional occupational archetypes.
No real name, institution, company logo, or recognizable real-person likeness appears in public assets.
Character source artwork contains no card frame, text, number, rarity mark, fatigue meter, health bar, skill icon, or UI.
Fatigue and skills are data-driven and rendered by a separate runtime overlay layer.
Approved art uses descriptive cinematic semi-realistic anime aesthetics without naming or imitating a living artist.
